analysis_commentary: Both runs satisfy collapse thresholds (max_max 0.52 vs 0.11, illegal_min 0.23 vs 0.46, entropy 6.62 vs 6.69 — both well above 5). Legal-mass improved meaningfully (0.69 vs 0.54) and top1_legal went positive for the first time, but max_prob jumped 5x (0.52 vs 0.11) — confidence grew on mostly-legal moves. Mixed signals, no clear goal win.
